name_en: 【Premium Quality】M11468 Blue Suit Wallet Series New Arrival MULTIPLE Wallet. This Multiple Wallet features Monogram Eclipse Reverse coated canvas with clean lines, accented by calfskin trim. It includes card slots and a bill compartment, with a compact design that fits easily into most pockets or handbags. 11.5 x 9 x 1.5 cm.
